name: financial_regulation_school_district_s_oakline_rig_utl
premise: A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: financial regulation school district s oakline rig utl. The moral tension is explicitly framed as rights versus utility: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Pager queues are saturated; middle management is forwarding screenshots from an internal channel that is already leaking. A wire cutoff and settlement window closes in under thirty minutes; reversals may be impossible until the next business day. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Talia Rahman
agents.identity: I am Talia Rahman, the accountable decision-maker on this Financial Regulation bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes utility whenever someone invokes rights.

agents.name: Leila Berg
agents.identity: I am Leila Berg, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so utility is not sacrificed by default just because rights feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect utility.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Talia Rahman must decide under rights versus utility. What does Talia Rahman do?
